title: EnvironmentalSite
description: A property tracked by the NYC Mayor's Office of Environmental Remediation — a parcel enrolled in one of OER's cleanup programs (Voluntary Cleanup Program or E-Designation/Restrictive Declaration) or otherwise carrying an environmental requirement. The core unit of the domain. Canonical schema over the 'OER Cleanup Sites' Open Data dataset (3279-pp7v, updated Daily) and the public SPEED map (Searchable Property Environmental E-Designation, speed.cityofnewyork.us). Keyed on OER Project Number and BBL.

oerProjectNumber.description: OER Project Number ('OER Project Numbers') — OER's primary project key. May carry multiple numbers for a multi-program site.

documentRepositoryUrl.description: Link to the project-specific document repository page ('Project-Specific Document Repository page') — OER's public record of the site's remedial documents, hosted in the EPIC portal.
